mission.title: Install and Configure Hexa Policy Orchestrator
mission.description: Hexa is a CNCF policy orchestrator that provides unified access control across platforms by converting between IDQL (a universal policy format) and platform-specific policy formats including OPA, Azure RBAC, and Google IAP.

steps.title: Clone the Hexa repository
steps.description:
Clone the Hexa Policy Orchestrator repo.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/hexa-org/policy-orchestrator.git
cd policy-orchestrator
```

steps.title: Start infrastructure services
steps.description:
Start the required Keycloak and PostgreSQL services.

```bash
docker compose -f demo/docker-compose.shared.yml up -d
```

steps.title: Start Hexa services
steps.description:
Start the Hexa orchestrator and admin UI.

```bash
cd demo && docker compose up -d
```

steps.title: Verify services are running
steps.description:
Check all containers are healthy.

```bash
docker compose ps
```

> You should see the orchestrator, admin UI, Keycloak, and PostgreSQL containers running.

uninstall.title: Uninstall Hexa
uninstall.description:
Stop and remove all Hexa containers.

```bash
cd demo && docker compose down
docker compose -f docker-compose.shared.yml down
```
